title: Please help! Workdocs in another workdoc

posts.author: Wellington (Wellington de Godoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I am having a problem to put a workdoc file in another workdoc…

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FKxdF1N09q8

In the promotional video, we can clearly see the option and functionality, but acctualy there is no option.
Can you guys help me?

posts.author: gus.furtado (Gustavo Furtado (A-Players Brazil))
posts.cookedHtml: Upvote. We still don’t have this feature as well.

posts.author: kyaustudio (Kyau Studio)
posts.cookedHtml: This is super useful especially when you are working with a workdoc and would like to reference another workdoc. I hope they make it happen sooner.

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
I was looking for a similar feature as well and found this feature request.
Have you found any solution on the meanwhile?
I would also be interested on how are you guys using Monday docs and how would you benefit from linking docs? We are new in Monday and are looking for some inspiration on how to use it in a best way.

Thank you
